channel.title: flutter on BrunoSXS' Cave

item.title: Flutter Quick Tips
item.description: InkWell: any child added to it turns into a button. It has the events “onTap”, “onLongPress” and “onDoubleTap”. Simply add your methods to those and you can make that text widget or that image a button.
